src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the JHipster version string in the generated annotation to reflect the current generator version.
Reformat the annotation declaration to use a single-line style instead of a multi-line block.
Explicitly exclude H2ConsoleAutoConfiguration to prevent the H2 web console from starting, likely for security or configuration alignment in newer Spring Boot versions.
Update the import path for LiquibaseProperties to match the new package structure in Spring Boot 3.x.
Rename the logger instance from 'log' to 'LOG' to adhere to standard Java naming conventions for static final fields.
Replace explicit type declarations with 'var' for local variables where the type is obvious, leveraging Java 10+ features.
Extract the application name property into a dedicated variable to improve code readability and reuse in the startup log message.
Reformat the multi-line string literal into a Java 15+ text block for better readability and alignment.
Replace explicit Logger type declaration with var to utilize Java 10+ local variable type inference.
